crisis.title: Crisis Resources
crisis.subtitle: If you're in crisis, help is available 24/7
crisis.emergencySubtitle: If you or someone you know is in immediate danger, please reach out:
crisis.alertSentDesc: Your care team has been notified and will reach out shortly.
crisis.alertFailedDesc: Please call 988 or 911 directly if you need immediate help.
crisis.alwaysAvailable: Crisis support is always available, even if this alert fails.
crisis.offlineMessage: You appear to be offline. Please call these numbers directly:

checkin.title: Daily Check-in
checkin.subtitle: How are you feeling today?
checkin.notesPlaceholder: Share anything else on your mind...

journal.title: Journal
journal.subtitle: Write about your thoughts and feelings
journal.empty: No journal entries yet. Start writing to track your journey.

voice.title: Voice Memo
voice.subtitle: Record your thoughts
voice.empty: No voice memos yet. Tap to record your first one.

chat.title: AI Companion
chat.subtitle: I'm here to listen and help you reflect
chat.disclaimer: This is an AI assistant, not a licensed therapist. For emergencies, call 988.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Your wellness journey
history.noData: No data yet. Complete a check-in to get started.

settings.title: Settings
settings.dataExportDesc: Download all your data (HIPAA Right of Access)
settings.deleteAccountWarning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
